svg.aria-label: REDACTED — a daily mystery no single reader can solve alone

g.text: BUILT FOR REDDIT - GAMES WITH A HOOK
A daily mystery no single reader can solve alone.
Every player's dossier is censored differently
The comment thread IS the evidence board
Hourly shard drip - cases always close
the pawn ticket was dated the 14th - AFTER the fire
FILE MY EVIDENCE - posts as your comment
